`вҳ… Insight в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`
вҖў Two of the three **hidden_dependency** tensions (TN4, TN7) revealed required infrastructure that otherwise would have been discovered only during implementation in m4 or failure in m5. Hidden dependencies are the best ROI tensions to surface early вҖ” each generated one-or-two new sub-constraints (S-SUG-1, O-SUG-1, O-SUG-2) with zero rework cost.
вҖў The **blocking_dependencies** export drives m3-anchor's prioritization: the first Required Truths derived will be for O2 (atomic writes) and S1 (data-boundary envelope), because nothing T1-related can be verified until those exist. This is ToC-style bottleneck-first sequencing.
вҖў Notice that **every single tension resolved without VIOLATED verdicts.** That's because m1 had already isolated INVARIANTs (B2, B3, T1, T2, S1, S2, U1, U3, O2) from GOALs (B1, T4, U2, O1) вҖ” when a trade-off can be resolved by flexing a GOAL rather than an INVARIANT, propagation stays SAFE.
